title: Bootstrap Spring Boot Project
description: Use Spring Initializr to generate a Spring Boot project with dependencies: Spring Web, Spring Data JPA, H2 Database, Validation.

title: Define the Task JPA Entity
description: Create a `Task` entity with fields: id (auto-increment Long), title (String, not null), description (String), priority (Enum: LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH), status (Enum: TODO/IN_PROGRESS/DONE), dueDate (LocalDate), createdAt (LocalDateTime).

title: Create TaskRepository & TaskService
description: Create a `TaskRepository` extending `JpaRepository<Task, Long>`. Create a `TaskService` with methods: findAll, findById, save, update, delete.
acceptanceCriteria: All CRUD operations work via repository methods
Service throws ResourceNotFoundException when task not found

title: GET /api/tasks — List All Tasks
description: Implement GET /api/tasks returning all tasks as JSON array. Create a TaskDTO to decouple the API response from the entity.
acceptanceCriteria: Endpoint returns 200 OK with JSON array
hints: Use ModelMapper or manual mapping for Entity → DTO

title: POST /api/tasks — Create Task
description: Implement POST /api/tasks accepting a TaskCreateRequest body. Validate, save, and return 201 Created with the created TaskDTO.
acceptanceCriteria: Created task returned in response body

title: PUT /api/tasks/{id} — Update Task
description: Implement PUT /api/tasks/{id} to update all task fields. Return 200 OK with updated DTO. Return 404 if task not found.
acceptanceCriteria: Returns 404 Not Found for missing task ID
hints: Fetch existing entity, update fields, save

title: DELETE /api/tasks/{id} — Delete Task
description: Implement DELETE /api/tasks/{id}. Return 204 No Content on success. Return 404 if not found.

title: Add Bean Validation to TaskCreateRequest
description: Annotate the TaskCreateRequest DTO with @NotBlank, @NotNull, @FutureOrPresent (for dueDate), and @Size constraints. Enable validation with @Valid on the controller method.
acceptanceCriteria: Blank title returns 400 with field error
Error response includes field name and message

title: Implement GlobalExceptionHandler
description: Create a @ControllerAdvice class that handles MethodArgumentNotValidException (400), ResourceNotFoundException (404), and Exception (500). Return structured JSON: {timestamp, status, error, message}.
acceptanceCriteria: JSON response contains timestamp, status, error, message
404 response includes the resource ID that was not found
Unhandled exceptions return generic 500 message (not stack trace)

title: Configure CORS for React Frontend
description: Configure Spring Boot to allow cross-origin requests from `http://localhost:5173` (Vite dev server). Test that browser preflight OPTIONS requests succeed.
acceptanceCriteria: No CORS errors in browser console when calling API from React
hints: Use @CrossOrigin on @RestController or configure globally via WebMvcConfigurer

title: Build React Task List Page
description: Create a React page that fetches tasks from GET /api/tasks via Axios on mount and displays them in a table or card grid. Show task title, priority badge, status badge, and due date.
acceptanceCriteria: Tasks fetched from API on page load
Priority shown as color-coded badge (HIGH=red, MEDIUM=yellow, LOW=green)
Status shown as badge (TODO=gray, IN_PROGRESS=blue, DONE=green)
Error message shown on API failure
hints: Use useEffect + useState for data fetching

title: Build Create Task Form
description: Add a modal or inline form for creating a new task. On submit, call POST /api/tasks and refresh the task list on success.
acceptanceCriteria: Form has Title, Description, Priority, Status, Due Date fields
hints: Use useState for form field values
Call fetchTasks() after successful post to refresh list

title: Add Task Filtering & Sorting
description: Add query parameters to GET /api/tasks: ?status=TODO, ?priority=HIGH, ?sortBy=dueDate. Implement filtering using Spring Data JPA derived queries or @Query.
acceptanceCriteria: ?sortBy=dueDate returns tasks sorted by dueDate ascending
hints: Use Spring Data JPA Specification for dynamic filtering

title: Write Integration Tests with @SpringBootTest
description: Write integration tests using @SpringBootTest and MockMvc that test the full HTTP request/response cycle: create task, fetch tasks, update, delete.
acceptanceCriteria: POST test verifies 201 Created and response body
GET test verifies 200 OK and non-empty list
Invalid POST body test verifies 400 with error details

title: Due Date Alerts on React Frontend
description: On the React task list, highlight tasks due today in orange and overdue tasks in red. Add an alert banner showing count of overdue tasks.
acceptanceCriteria: Tasks due today highlighted in orange
Alert banner shows 'N tasks are overdue' count
Highlighting uses CSS classes not inline styles
hints: Add conditional className based on comparison result
